_meta.experiment: Frontier K2+distill vs K3-PTQ multi-benchmark (Adriel 3 questions)

verdict: P1: K2+distill does NOT beat K3-PTQ per-bit — K3-PTQ > K2+distill on ALL 3 benchmarks (gsm8k 0.48>0.31, arc 0.40>0.30, hella 0.62>0.58); the third plane dominates the adapter (Paper H confirmed multi-benchmark). P3: K2+distill recovers REAL accuracy (gsm8k 0.02->0.31, ~48% of gap), not PPL-only, but stays behind K3-PTQ everywhere; recovery is MATH-FOCUSED (fixes what collapsed, not what survived). P2 (mechanism): numbers localize it to math; circuit-level study is separate. Dissociation reconfirmed: K2 kills math (0.63->0.02), preserves knowledge/commonsense (arc -28%, hella -23%). Caveats: N=100, 1 model, 1 seed, 300 steps.
